# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official base image with a known good security posture
FROM alpine:latest

# Set the working directory inside the container
WORKDIR /app

# Copy user-uploaded files from the mounted volume into the container
COPY --from=builder /uploads /app/uploads

# Ensure that only the necessary permissions are set for the uploaded files
RUN chmod -R 755 /app/uploads

# Set up any required environment variables or configurations
ENV PROCESSING_MODE="batch"

# Define the command to run when the container starts
CMD ["sh", "-c", "while true; do find /app/uploads -type f -name '*.txt' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo Processing {} && cat {}'; sleep 10; done"]
